description: PLMKR Capital and funding knowledge base — load order for knowledge assembly

files.description: Capital stack taxonomy, non-dilutive-first sequencing doctrine, true all-in cost of capital, WACC/IRR comparison, source ranking, encumbrance and optionality, music-sector cost-of-capital adjustments
Grant strategy and disposition discipline, matching-fund math, eligible-expenditure and IP strings, clawback-risk mapping, sponsorship/partnership as a capital source, revenue and royalty financing
Instrument-to-use matching, DSCR and coverage analysis, catalog/IP-backed lending, equity and dilution math, liquidation-preference waterfall, convertibles, cap-table preservation
Term-sheet anatomy, fatal-term taxonomy, covenant risk classification and stress-testing, clawback-trigger mapping, music-specific grant and label/investor covenant hazards, breach monitoring
Eight-dimension capital soundness scorecard — weights, anchors, hard gates (repayment/recoupment/clawback, terms/covenant), scoring rules, confidence tagging, composite formula, output bands

Five output templates (Capital Raise Recommendation, Soundness Scorecard, Non-Dilutive Opportunity Assessment, Term Sheet Red-Flag Analysis, Capital Stack Summary), adversarial FUNDABLE/WITH CONDITIONS/NOT FUNDABLE verdict, handoff boundaries, hard refusals

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, sibling products, or entity names from any source material.
notes.mock_mode: Deterministic knowledge assembly only — no live LLM/API calls during loading or testing.
